DataRequest.techniqueName: Impair Defenses: Disable Windows Event Logging
DataRequest.Name: Windows: Windows Event Auditing Disabled / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects scenarios where system auditing (ie: windows event log auditing) is disabled. This may be used in a scenario where an entity would want to bypass local logging to evade detection when windows event logging is enabled and reviewed. This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/builtin/win_disable_event_logging.yml

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Security-4719" AND actionName CONTAIN "removed" AND user NOT CONTAIN "$"
